title: fgentic.admin_action.v1
description: Closed record: one privileged Synapse/MAS admin-API mutation attributed to the acting admin (issue #455, ADR 0018 discipline). It attributes an admin-API call; it does not authenticate intent, and actions performed by a direct database operator or via kubectl are out of scope. Message content, media bytes, tokens, IPs, User-Agent values, and request arguments are structurally excluded.

acting_admin.description: Full MXID of the authenticated admin who issued the request (never a bare localpart — D6).

action_class.description: The closed set of audited privileged action classes. Adding a class is a new schema version.

target.description: Bounded target identifier (an MXID, room ID, media ID, token ID, or report ID) — a linkable operational identifier, never content or a secret.

outcome.description: Terminal outcome of the admin request; a denied non-admin attempt is recorded as denied, never silently dropped.
